sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73571" key="o(modi/aita" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμο-δίαιτα</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73571.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living in a common establishment,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν ὁ. ἐποιησάμην ἅμα αὐτῷ</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg004.perseus-grc1:2231" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2231</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> <date TEIform="date">(vi A. D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
